coreTruthSet.description: Perception prioritizes absence and distortion of expected signals over overtly visible anomalies.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: She reads what is missing more than what is present.

coreTruthSet.description: Second matriarch child POV mode shifts to pattern-breakdown awareness marked by inability to find stable sequence or response.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Pattern Breakdown Awareness ... something that has no pattern at all.

coreTruthSet.description: Blind spot persists as insistence that a discoverable cause exists, delaying acceptance of invisible or uncontrollable forces.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Still believes there must be a cause ... does not yet accept some forces are invisible and uncontrollable.

settingAnchors.name: Scene 10 Contaminated-Space Field
settingAnchors.description: Perceptual field where space is experienced as heavy, muted, and behaviorally constrained without clear visible trigger.

continuityConstraints.title: Where-Is-the-Pattern Filter
continuityConstraints.text: Scene cognition repeatedly seeks sequence and origin even when evidence stream is discontinuous, producing structured unease.

continuityConstraints.title: Observation Method Failure
continuityConstraints.text: Character arc requires explicit encounter with limits of observation as a universal explanatory method.

continuityConstraints.title: Quiet Fear Without Direction
continuityConstraints.text: Emotional register should remain low-amplitude and persistent, avoiding panic while signaling unresolved systemic threat.

openResearchGaps.title: How much visible authority uncertainty can be shown before social trust destabilizes too early?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to balance realism with continuity of communal order.

openResearchGaps.title: What scene event finally breaks the causality-insistence blind spot and forces acceptance of uncontrollable forces?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to define a clear developmental hinge in the second matriarch arc.

openResearchGaps.title: Which recurring missing-signal markers best track the transition from unease to confirmed systemic threat?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed for consistent escalation logic across illness-linked scenes.
